name: Fresh Bananas with Raisin-Walnut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 bananas, peeled and cut in half lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt the butter.
2. Add brown sugar and lemon juice to the melted butter.
3. Peel the bananas and add them to the skillet.
4. Cook for 1 or 2 minutes on each side until lightly browned.
5. Stir in the raisins and walnuts.
6. Warm the brandy, then ignite it.
7. Pour the brandy over the bananas and gently shake the pan until the flame dies down.
Serves 5.
